questions.question: Describe the three main components of the environment. What are their characteristics and how do they interact with each other?
questions.hint: Focus on the biotic and abiotic factors

questions.question: What are the differences between the physical environment and the human environment? Provide examples to support your answer.
Explain the concept of ecosystem services and the role of human activities in altering these services. What are the consequences of human actions on the environment?
questions.hint: Focus on the impact of human activities on ecosystem health
